title: Chammanad devi temple
tagline: Chammanad devi temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Chammanad Devi Temple or Chammanad Bhadrakali Temple is a temple located 200 metres from the National Highway, between Vyttila and the town of Cherthala (16 km from each place).
overview.description: Chammanad Devi Temple or Chammanad Bhadrakali Temple is a temple located 200 metres from the National Highway, between Vyttila and the town of Cherthala (16 km from each place). It is situated in Kodamthuruth neighbourhood of Alappuzha, Kerala in India. The 10-day festival Utsavam is celebrated in Kumbha month. There are two sub temples: Shasta Temple - Near the E.C.E.K. Union High School.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Eramalloor
topPlaces.description: Eramalloor is a village in Ezhupunna Grama Panchayat in the Cherthala taluk in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Ezhupunna
topPlaces.description: Ezhupunna is a village in the taluk of Cherthala in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies between Alappuzha and Kochi, near National Highway 66.

topPlaces.name: Kakkathuruth
topPlaces.description: Kakkathuruth is a tiny island located at the Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala surrounded by the Vembanatu Lake. Known as the Island of crows, the National Geographic described the sunset seen from Kakkathuruthu as the best in the world.

topPlaces.name: Kuthiathode
topPlaces.description: Kuthiathode is a gram panchayat in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is only 20 minutes from Kochi city.

topPlaces.name: Kodamthuruth
topPlaces.description: Kodamthuruth is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a panchayat, which comes under the Aroor Assembly constituency.

topPlaces.name: Nalukulangara Maha Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Nalukulangara Maha Devi Temple is situated in Kuthiathode Panchayath in Kerala, India. It is a prominent Devi temple in Alappuzha.

topPlaces.name: Thrichattukulam Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Thrichattukulam Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: തൃച്ചാറ്റുകുളം മഹാദേവക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated on the banks of the Vembanad Lake at Panavally Island of Alleppey District in Kerala state in India. The Thrichattukulam Mahadeva Temple is one of the three important shiva Temple in Karappuram Kingdom (Malayalam: കരപ്പുറം രാജ്യം) in Kerala, those are Velorvattom Sri Mahadeva Temple, Nalpathaneeswaram Sree Mahadeva Temple and Thrichattukulam Mahadeva Temple.

topPlaces.name: Nalpathaneeswaram Sree Mahadeva Temple
topPlaces.description: Nalppathenneeswaram Sree Mahadeva Temple is a Mahadevar temple situated in Nalppathenneswaram, in Panavally village of Cherthala taluk in Alleppy district of Kerala state; this place is 20 kilometers from Cherthala and 11 kilometers from Aroor on the Cherthala Arookutty bus route. Here Lord Siva is in Kiratha Bhava.

items.note: Eramalloor is a village in Ezhupunna Grama Panchayat in the Cherthala taluk in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala.
Ezhupunna is a village in the taluk of Cherthala in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies between Alappuzha and Kochi, near National Highway 66.

Kakkathuruth is a tiny island located at the Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala surrounded by the Vembanatu Lake. Known as the Island of crows, the National Geographic described the sunset seen from Kakkathuruthu as the best in the world.
Kuthiathode is a gram panchayat in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is only 20 minutes from Kochi city.
Kodamthuruth is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is a panchayat, which comes under the Aroor Assembly constituency.
Nalukulangara Maha Devi Temple is situated in Kuthiathode Panchayath in Kerala, India. It is a prominent Devi temple in Alappuzha.

Thrichattukulam Mahadeva Temple (Malayalam: തൃച്ചാറ്റുകുളം മഹാദേവക്ഷേത്രം) is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva is situated on the banks of the Vembanad Lake at Panavally Island of Alleppey District in Kerala state in India. The Thrichattukulam Mahadeva Temple is one of the three important shiva Temple in Karappuram Kingdom (Malayalam: കരപ്പുറം രാജ്യം) in Kerala, those are Velorvattom Sri Mahadeva Temple, Nalpathaneeswaram Sree Mahadeva Temple and Thrichattukulam Mahadeva Temple.

Nalppathenneeswaram Sree Mahadeva Temple is a Mahadevar temple situated in Nalppathenneswaram, in Panavally village of Cherthala taluk in Alleppy district of Kerala state; this place is 20 kilometers from Cherthala and 11 kilometers from Aroor on the Cherthala Arookutty bus route. Here Lord Siva is in Kiratha Bhava.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chammanad devi temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chammanad devi temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chammanad devi temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (39 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (18 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chammanad devi temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chammanad devi temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chammanad devi temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chammanad devi temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chammanad devi temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Eramalloor, Ezhupunna, Kakkathuruth, Kuthiathode, Kodamthuruth.
